step_rationale: Systemic fibrosis and ischemic-remodeling marker; off atherothrombotic cascade.
mechanism: Galectin-3 reflects post-MI cardiac fibrosis and remodeling; acts as an off-pathway systemic indicator of myocardial stress.

references.title: Associations between circulating proteins and corresponding genes expressed in coronary thrombi in patients with acute myocardial infarction.
